title: Carbon config
description: Configuration for a DotCarbon desktop app (carbon.json).

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocomplete.

identifier.description: Reverse-DNS bundle identifier, e.g. "com.example.app". Used by installers, notifications, and OS integration.

Window.description: Main window options, applied at launch.

x.description: Explicit top-left X. When x and y are both set, overrides center.

y.description: Explicit top-left Y. When x and y are both set, overrides center.

center.description: Center the window on launch (ignored when x/y are set).

decorations.description: Window chrome (title bar + border). Set false for a frameless window.

devtools.description: Allow opening the webview dev tools.

contextMenu.description: Allow the webview's right-click context menu.

icon.description: Path to a window icon file (relative to the working directory).

devCommand.description: Command that starts your frontend dev server.

buildCommand.description: Command that builds the frontend. When omitted, DotCarbon derives it from devCommand.

devUrl.description: URL the dev server serves on.

frontendDist.description: Path to the built frontend, relative to the project.

backendProject.description: Path to the executable .csproj (or its directory), relative to the project. Recommended when a repository contains multiple executable projects.
